Denise J. Serra of McNAMARA, NEY, BEATTY & SLATTERY (707-427-3998), appearing for defendant Hofmann Construction Co.

RULING: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO APPOINT RICK HOLBROOK AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO, AND SUBSTITUTE SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST FOR, DECEASED PLAINTIFF AND FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

No appearance by plaintiff, no opposition and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to appoint Rick Holbrook as successor-in-interest to, and substitute successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff and for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. Mr. Holbrook has provided sufficient facts in support of his declaration that he is authorized to act on behalf of the beneficiary of Richard Walls's estate with respect to the decedent's interest in the action or proceeding, as required under section 377.11. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed order in compliance with C.R.C. 3.1312. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
